summary: MASN2 VOD FF to the end
description:
GIVEN a logged in user is entitled for MASN2 RSN
AND the user is on the MASN2 page
AND the user selects a VOD to watch

steps.action: WHEN the user Fast Forwards the video to the end
steps.result:
THEN the video player is dismissed
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page
